mapper.select: SELECT r.role_name FROM users u JOIN user_roles ur ON ur.user_id = u.id JOIN roles r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE u.login_id = #{loginId}

SELECT res.id, res.url_pattern, res.http_method, r.role_name, res.sort_order FROM resources res JOIN role_resources rr ON rr.resource_id = res.id JOIN roles r ON r.id = rr.role_id ORDER BY res.sort_order ASC
